name: Rubbed Butterflied Leg of Lamb W/garlic,rosemary&thyme (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt, black pepper, olive oil, minced garlic, and rosemary well until combined.
2. Rub the mixture thoroughly over the leg of lamb.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and allow it to burn down to embers.
5. Grill the lamb for 18 minutes on one side, then flip and grill for an additional 14 minutes on the second side.
6. Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
7. Serve with grilled ratatouille and basil.
